uncertainties.read: TRANSPOSED Schedule B grid: each COLUMN is one transaction (10 columns). Rows carry EIF marker + SP owner + asset name + ticker + P/S type; middle is an unlabeled amount-of-transaction bucket matrix (X marks are dark bars); dates are the bottom row. Amount buckets and cap_gain_over_200 rows unlabeled on this sheet (labels off-page) and degraded, so amount=null and cap_gain_over_200=null for every tx. owner/asset/ticker/tx_type/date captured. 'M and R Schedule B' = M & R Trust Partnership Schedule B.
uncertainties.note: downstream: amounts require the row-label key from the schedule header page to resolve the transposed matrix
